name: harrylabsj--mood-line
description: Turn a user's described feelings, mood, or emotional state into a concise, resonant line. Use when the user wants help expressing emotions, summarizing a feeling, writing a quotable sentence, polishing an emotional caption, diary line,朋友圈文案, or self-expression text. If using an authentic quote, include the source only when attribution is reliable; otherwise output a natural unattributed line without pretending it is famous. Never fabricate sources.
